main.node: GHL – Search Contact by Email (Render) - Retry
Execute Workflow – New Lead Alert SMS

nodes.name: Config – GHL IDs
nodes.notes: locationId/pipelineId/stageId resolved for the Retail Sales pipeline, Visualizer/Estimate Submitted stage.

nodes.name: Build Contact Payload (Filter Nulls)
nodes.notes: Never-null-write fix: only includes keys that are actually present in the payload. Carries the real GHL custom field IDs already proven in production (see metroplex-visualizer/src/app/page.tsx history) so the ID mapping lives server-side in n8n, not in the client bundle.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "pipelineId": $('Build Contact Payload (Filter Nulls)').item.json.pipelineId, "locationId": $('Build Contact Payload (Filter Nulls)').item.json.locationId, "pipelineStageId": $('Build Contact Payload (Filter Nulls)').item.json.stageId, "name": ($('Build Contact Payload (Filter Nulls)').item.json.firstName + ' ' + $('Build Contact Payload (Filter Nulls)').item.json.lastName + ' - ' + $('Build Contact Payload (Filter Nulls)').item.json.source.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + $('Build Contact Payload (Filter Nulls)').item.json.source.slice(1) + ' Lead').trim(), "status": "open", "contactId": $json.contactId, "source": $('Build Contact Payload (Filter Nulls)').item.json.source } }}

nodes.name: Create Opportunity
nodes.notes: pipelineId / stageId come from the Config node.

nodes.name: Execute Workflow – New Lead Alert SMS
nodes.notes: Workflow 5 (New Lead Alert SMS) is built after Workflows 1-2 per the build order. Set the real workflowId here once it exists. continueOnFail is on so lead intake still succeeds if Workflow 5 isn't built/active yet.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ (() => { const b = $('Webhook – Lead Intake (Visualizer)').first().json.body; const contactId = $json.contact.id; const html = ` Your Metal Roof Rendering

Hi ${b.firstName},

Your AI-rendered metal roof is ready. Here's what your home could look like:

Estimated Investment
${b.estimateRange || ''}

This figure is based on your home's estimated roof dimensions, but all final proposals are subject to 1) an EagleView satellite imaging to confirm exact surface area and slopes and 2) an on-site inspection to assess any existing conditions, such as decking damage or structural issues, that may affect final scope and investment. Materials tailored to your individualized roofing system may vary. Your final quote will be provided after inspection at no obligation.

Schedule Your Free Consultation

Andrew

Metroplex Metal Roofs

(817) 382-3338

© 2025 Metroplex Metal Roofs · Dallas-Fort Worth, TX
`; return { type: 'Email', contactId: contactId, subject: `${b.firstName} - Your Metal Roof Rendering is Ready`, html: html, locationId: '4rvwvGT5Ot8Dxyoo7UwS' }; })() }}

nodes.name: Check Existing Opportunity
nodes.notes: Dedup + stage-guard: never create a duplicate opportunity for a contact that already has one. Only re-affirm the stage if it's still at the initial intake stage — if sales has moved it forward, leave it alone.

nodes.name: Normalize Opportunity Result
nodes.notes: Converges Create Opportunity / Update Opportunity Stage / noop branches into one consistent shape (flat contactId + nested opportunity.contactId) so Add Insurance Claim Tag and Execute Workflow – New Lead Alert SMS work correctly no matter which dedup branch fired.

nodes.name: GHL – Search Contact by Email (Render) - Retry
